title: chloris pilosa var. nigra
intro: Chloris pilosa var. nigra, also known as black grass or black hairy grass, is a variety of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Chloris pilosa var. nigra is often used as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and can also be applied topically as a poultice or cream to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
